contexts.context: ...—the thymy vale Where oft enchanted with Socratic sounds <mark>Ilissus</mark> pure devolved his tuneful stream In gentler murmurs....
...once beneath That ever-living plantane's ample boughs <mark>Ilissus</mark> by Socratic sounds detain'd On his neglected urn attentive...
...The Pleasures of Imagination I.592-5, altered. <mark>Ilissus</mark> is a river in Athens. Back
